case_title: CROWN HOTEL LLC VS. ROBERT JENKINS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROWN HOTEL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENKINS, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 528 VALENCIA STREET, #206, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110-1115, SEE SCANNED DOC
